docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZUREK, SEBASTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT SECRET STUDIOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SECRET STUDIOS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-28-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-02-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH DEFT. PAYING PLFT'S MEDICAL & AMBULANCE BILLS WITH COLLECTION AGENCY, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 11/2/01, COURT WILL DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SECRET STUDIOS NO APPEARANCES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
